examples.text: ...until one day they came together and made another jump in complexity, to plants, animals and fungi.
examples.explanation: fungi 是 fungus 的复数形式，此处指生物分类中的真菌界。

reviewSessions.example_text: ...until one day they came together and made another jump in complexity, to plants, animals and fungi.
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案与词义不符。fungus 指“真菌”，不是“细菌”；结合例句 fungi 为其复数，指真菌类生物。
matched_points: 答案涉及微生物/生物类别，方向有一定关联
missing_points: fungus 的正确含义是真菌
未识别 fungi 是 fungus 的复数形式

reviewSessions.example_text: ...until one day they came together and made another jump in complexity, to plants, animals and fungi.
reviewSessions.feedback: 这次没填对，正确答案是 fungus。
missing_points: 需要回忆出目标词 fungus
